calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jun-20-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PETITIONER COLUMBIA CREDIT SERVICES, INC. Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. ( PRINCIPAL- $17,207.92; INTEREST -$3,773.48; COST-$413.50; ATTY'S FEE- $520.00. TOTAL JUDGMENT =$21,914.90) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR # 8189 =301/PJB
